title: LEC failed after yosys synthesis
code_blocks:
read_verilog gcd.v

hierarchy -top gcd
proc
opt 
opt
async2sync
opt
splitnets -ports
opt
flatten
opt
select gcd
rename -hide
    
                   
design -stash gold


read_verilog res.v

hierarchy -top gcd
proc
opt
opt
async2sync
opt
splitnets -ports
opt
flatten
opt
select gcd
rename -hide

design -stash gate


design -copy-from gold -as gold gcd
design -copy-from gate -as gate gcd

miter -equiv -flatten -ignore_gold_x gold gate miter
hierarchy -top miter
opt
select miter
hierarchy -top miter
rename -hide

sat -verify -tempinduct -prove trigger 0 -set-init-undef -set-def-inputs -seq 5
